title: Personal Independence Payment: April 2013 to October 2019
body: " The latest release of these statistics can be found in the Personal Independence Payment statistics collection.   These official statistics include data up to 31 October 2019 for:   caseloads (cases with entitlement) registrations, clearances and awards award rates award types and review periods mandatory reconsiderations average clearance times and average outstanding times experimental statistics for mandatory reconsideration clearance times experimental statistics tracking initial decisions following a PIP assessment through to mandatory reconsideration and appeal experimental statistics for PIP award review and change of circumstance registrations and clearances   More information  View an interactive dashboard of the latest PIP statistics by region.  Read more about the PIP quarterly statistics.  "
